productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Casual Black Sandals
description: This stylish pair of slide-ins from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These sandals give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with linen pants and shirts for a refined look.UpperLeather uppers covering the midfoot for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleRounded toe box for more comfortTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleLeather covered cushioned footbed in ergonomic design for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceTextured outsole with lugs for better gripSlight heel for ergonomic comfortWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
